description: CoinVoyage MCP — create crypto PayOrders, webhooks, swaps across Bitcoin/Solana/EVM chains.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.KingPeque/coinvoyage

environmentVariables.description: Your CoinVoyage public API key. Get one at https://dashboard.coinvoyage.io (Developers section).
environmentVariables.name: COINVOYAGE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Server-side API secret. Required for SALE/REFUND PayOrders, fee claims, and webhook management. Leave unset if you only need DEPOSIT (merchant invoice) flows.
environmentVariables.name: COINVOYAGE_API_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.coinvoyage.io.
environmentVariables.name: COINVOYAGE_API_BASE_URL
